title: Getting Started
content: Introduction. Installation. Features. Test. Audit. Examples. Documentation

title: Checkbox
content: Accessible Checkbox component utility. Uses aria-checked, aria-label. Form Input. screen reader

title: Accordion
content: Accessible Accordion component utility. Uses aria-expanded, aria-label. Ideal for FAQs. screen reader

title: Menu
content: Accessible Menu component utility. Uses aria-label, aria-labelledby, role='menu', role='button', aria-controls, aria-haspopup. Focus trap. Intuitive Keyboard navigation, interaction. Escape key closes menu. screen reader

title: Radio
content: Accessible Radio component utility. Ideal for selecting one option from many. screen reader

title: Block
content: Accessible Block component utility. Focus trap. Intuitive Keyboard navigation, interaction

title: Toggle
content: Accessible Toggle switch component utility. Uses aria-pressed, aria-label. Ideal for dark mode, settings, and preferences. screen reader

title: Changelog
content: What's new, improved, and fixed in each release of Aria-Ease. Versions. Bug fixes. Features

title: Static Audit
content: Automated Accessibility Audit. Automated Accessibility Testing. Identify and fix accessibility issues. Development and Deployment workflow. CI/CD. component utility

title: Combobox
content: Accessible Combobox component utility. Uses aria-expanded, aria-controls, aria-activedescendant, role='combobox', role='listbox', role='option'. Ideal for searchable dropdowns. screen reader

title: Testing
content: Guides and best practices for testing accessibility of your custom components. component utility.
